tasks.title: Normalize remaining v1 backlog and dependency order
tasks.summary: Maintain the implemented/planned/missing table for all known v1 gaps and keep future implementation features independent.
notes: Covers true LAN browsing, agent daemon, ongoing incremental sync, broad interruption recovery, durable drift persistence/reconcile, approval/release UX, broader repair/reconcile, and traffic privacy level 2 release acceptance.
Non-goal: product code changes in this proposal-only feature.
DAG root remains f-22tnwsds8; follow-up implementation scopes are split into separate proposal-only features.

tasks.title: Open scoped prune release review UX implementation feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate current_tree implementation feature for a read-only prune review/release checklist command backed by existing prune review evidence.
notes: Implemented and archived as f-22unwv5qs; commit d938d40 feat(prune): add read-only release review.
The broader follow-up was completed in f-234nwra8e with approval inventory, supersede mutation, stale approval handling, readiness counts, and receipt comparison.

tasks.title: Open traffic privacy level 2 release acceptance feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate feature for repeatable level 2 traffic-shape acceptance evidence on the current profile-backed network path.
notes: Opened as f-22vnwgwjj.
Acceptance must explicitly say this is bounded traffic-shape protection, not anonymity.

tasks.title: Open broad network recovery acceptance feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate feature for interruption and resume acceptance across bounded network failure modes.
notes: Opened as f-22wnwd5pe.
Do not claim arbitrary recovery until kill/restart/reboot evidence exists.

tasks.title: Open durable drift detector persistence and reconcile feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate feature to persist live detector findings and reconcile them through durable drift surfaces.
notes: Opened as f-22xnwetxr.
Separate durable evidence from later automatic repair application.

tasks.title: Open LAN browsing discovery feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate feature for LAN advertisement/browse UX and bounded discovery evidence.
notes: Opened as f-22ynwqndn.
DAG dependency: f-22ynwqndn depends on f-22znw2utc because managed daemon lifecycle should own long-running advertise/listen surfaces.
Do not bundle daemon lifecycle or ongoing sync into LAN browsing.

tasks.title: Open agent daemon lifecycle feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate feature for managed daemon lifecycle around profile SSOT and existing serve behavior.
notes: Opened as f-22znw2utc.
Do not add runtime overrides that bypass profile configuration.

tasks.title: Open ongoing incremental sync feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate feature for durable changed-file queueing and long-running incremental sync.
notes: Opened as f-232nwu2nw.
DAG dependency: f-232nwu2nw depends on f-22znw2utc and f-22wnwd5pe because stable daemon lifecycle and network recovery evidence are prerequisites for ongoing sync.
Depends on stable daemon/session lifecycle decisions.

tasks.title: Open broader automatic repair and reconcile feature
tasks.summary: Create a separate feature for safe repair/reconcile planning, application, and receipts.
notes: Opened as f-233nwduwz.
DAG dependency: f-233nwduwz depends on f-22xnwetxr and f-234nwra8e because repair needs durable drift evidence and release/prune approval semantics.
Require preflight and explicit receipts before target mutation.
